violations.text: The hand-washing sink near the prep unit was lacking paper towels (automated machine was not working). PIC placed paper towels near hand sink. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2025
Inspector observed single-service items stored on the floor in the storage closet. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the table under flat top grill have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and/or other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2025

The floors in the storage closet has an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris and the floors in the walk-in freezer has an accumulation of ice. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer being cleaned during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2024

Vacuum packaged cooked lobster was observed thawing in the walk-in cooler with the packaging still intact. Vacuum packaged seafood must be opened prior to thawing. Food was observed at 29 degrees Fahrenheit. Packages were opened during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: 1. Interior of prep unit 2. Hot holding/ slow cooker units New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2024

The drain plug for the outside dumpster is missing. Drains in receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must have drain plugs in place. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2024

The following has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris: 1. floors under grill 2. ceiling by cook line and back of menu boards (dust) 3. floors in walk-in freezer (ice accumulation) The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2024

The following was observed in poor repair: 1. Coved tiles under 3 bay sink 2. Caulking at 3 bay sink 3. Ceiling tile above slicer (missing) The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2024
